title: Policy

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

name.description: Short human-readable name of the policy.

scope.description: Defines which subjects, objects, and purposes this policy governs.

rules.description: Ordered list of Rule clauses evaluated to produce the policy decision.

obligations.description: Default obligations attached to all permits issued by this policy.

exceptions.description: Named exceptions that override deny outcomes for specific circumstances.

description: A governance rule set that evaluates subject–object–purpose triples to produce permit/deny decisions, carrying attached obligations and optional per-exception overrides.
